prompt.content:
Update the following in the DCF model:

1) Extract the 2024 ending long term debt balance for SPGI and assume that number is the beginning long term debt balance at the beginning of 2027.
2) For S&P Global, replace the 2026 - 2030 Selling and general expenses rate with the average 2020 - 2024 SG&A expense rate (rounded to 2 decimals) of the company from the comparable list that had the highest EBITDA margin in 2024.
3) Based on the updated Unlevered FCF, Assume on the first day of each year starting in 2027, 20% of the previous year Unlevered cash flow is used to retire long term debt through the end of 2030. Assume annual interest on the long term debt is 4.50% and the interest is capitalized. Exclude current maturities from the calculation. 

Provide the ending long term debt balance at the end of 2030.

rubrics.name: States Ending Long term debt balance for 2030 is $4,970 (acceptable range... (ver_0301d797f05149e9b636e3436fac9f5c)

messages.content: States Ending Long term debt balance for 2030 is $4,970 (acceptable range $4,920 to $5,020).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: Ending Long term debt balance for 2030 is $4,970
